'''鈭歯g-m-j''' ('''ngamaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:habis|habis]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:habis|habis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-m-j
|-
! Lemma
| ngamaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngamajithi|ngamajithi]] || [[word:ngamajiji|ngamajiji]] || [[word:ngamajishi|ngamajishi]] || [[word:ngamaji|ngamaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamajuthuth|ngamajuthuth]] || [[word:ngamajujuj|ngamajujuj]] || [[word:ngamajushush|ngamajushush]] || [[word:ngamaj|ngamaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamajuthu|ngamajuthu]] || [[word:ngamajuju|ngamajuju]] || [[word:ngamajushu|ngamajushu]] || [[word:ngamaju|ngamaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamajufuth|ngamajufuth]] || [[word:ngamajufuj|ngamajufuj]] || [[word:ngamajufush|ngamajufush]] || [[word:ngamajuf|ngamajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngamajethe|ngamajethe]] || [[word:ngamajeje|ngamajeje]] || [[word:ngamajeshe|ngamajeshe]] || [[word:ngamaje|ngamaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamajothoth|ngamajothoth]] || [[word:ngamajojoj|ngamajojoj]] || [[word:ngamajoshosh|ngamajoshosh]] || [[word:ngamaj|ngamaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamajotho|ngamajotho]] || [[word:ngamajojo|ngamajojo]] || [[word:ngamajosho|ngamajosho]] || [[word:ngamajo|ngamajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamajofoth|ngamajofoth]] || [[word:ngamajofoj|ngamajofoj]] || [[word:ngamajofosh|ngamajofosh]] || [[word:ngamajof|ngamajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngamaj忙th忙|ngamaj忙th忙]] || [[word:ngamaj忙j忙|ngamaj忙j忙]] || [[word:ngamaj忙sh忙|ngamaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngamaj忙|ngamaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamajathath|ngamajathath]] || [[word:ngamajajaj|ngamajajaj]] || [[word:ngamajashash|ngamajashash]] || [[word:ngamaj|ngamaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamajatha|ngamajatha]] || [[word:ngamajaja|ngamajaja]] || [[word:ngamajasha|ngamajasha]] || [[word:ngamaja|ngamaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamajafath|ngamajafath]] || [[word:ngamajafaj|ngamajafaj]] || [[word:ngamajafash|ngamajafash]] || [[word:ngamajaf|ngamajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngamajasha|ngamajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongamajasha|gongamajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingamajasha|gokingamajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngamajn眉sha|ngamajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongamajnkn眉sha|gongamajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingamajn眉sha|gokingamajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngamajsh毛sha|ngamajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongamajnksh毛sha|gongamajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingamajsh毛sha|gokingamajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngamajrosha|ngamajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongamajnkrosha|gongamajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingamajrosha|gokingamajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamajmusha|ngamajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongamajnkmusha|gongamajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamajmusha|gokingamajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngamajsherasha|ngamajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongamajnksherasha|gongamajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingamajsherasha|gokingamajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngamajngasha|ngamajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongamajnkngasha|gongamajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingamajngasha|gokingamajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngamajyasha|ngamajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongamajnkyasha|gongamajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingamajyasha|gokingamajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngamajyamasha|ngamajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongamajnkyamasha|gongamajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingamajyamasha|gokingamajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngamajn眉sh毛sha|ngamajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongamajnkn眉sh毛sha|gongamajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingamajn眉sh毛sha|gokingamajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngamajn眉rosha|ngamajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongamajnkn眉rosha|gongamajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingamajn眉rosha|gokingamajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamajn眉musha|ngamajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongamajnkn眉musha|gongamajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamajn眉musha|gokingamajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngamajsh毛n眉sha|ngamajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongamajnksh毛n眉sha|gongamajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingamajsh毛n眉sha|gokingamajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngamajsh毛rosha|ngamajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongamajnksh毛rosha|gongamajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingamajsh毛rosha|gokingamajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamajsh毛musha|ngamajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongamajnksh毛musha|gongamajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamajsh毛musha|gokingamajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngamajron眉sha|ngamajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongamajnkron眉sha|gongamajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingamajron眉sha|gokingamajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngamajrosh毛sha|ngamajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongamajnkrosh毛sha|gongamajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingamajrosh毛sha|gokingamajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamajromusha|ngamajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongamajnkromusha|gongamajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamajromusha|gokingamajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngamajmun眉sha|ngamajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongamajnkmun眉sha|gongamajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingamajmun眉sha|gokingamajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngamajmush毛sha|ngamajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongamajnkmush毛sha|gongamajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingamajmush毛sha|gokingamajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngamajmurosha|ngamajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongamajnkmurosha|gongamajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingamajmurosha|gokingamajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngamaj|ngamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙m忙j|ng忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongamaj|hongamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙m忙j|hong忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongamaj|hohongamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙m忙j|hohong忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngamaj|n眉ngamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙m忙j|n眉ng忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngamaj|n眉n眉ngamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙m忙j|n眉n眉ng忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngamaj|n茂ngamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙m忙j|n茂ng忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngamaj|n茂n茂ngamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙m忙j|n茂n茂ng忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungamaj|lungamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙m忙j|lung忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungamaj|lulungamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙m忙j|lulung忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingamaj|lingamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙m忙j|ling忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingamaj|lilingamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙m忙j|liling忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongamaj|kongamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙m忙j|kong忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongamaj|kokongamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙m忙j|kokong忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengamaj|kengamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙m忙j|keng忙m忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengamaj|kekengamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙m忙j|kekeng忙m忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
